response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the song 'Motteke! Sailor Fuku' lyrics provided in the reference. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the reference lyrics and English translation as a base, with manual corrections for semantic accuracy (e.g., 'puni' as 'squishy' rather than 'pun') and inclusion of visual title cards. 3. Timing & Pacing: Applied tight timing to match the rapid-fire vocal delivery. Visual text for the live show and song credits was subtitled during their respective screen durations.

subtitles.original: TAN The Autofister Network 3D LIVE
subtitles.english: [Title: TAN The Autofister Network 3D LIVE]

subtitles.english: [Title: CCGG Theater]

subtitles.original: 曖昧3センチ そりゃぷにってコトかい?
subtitles.english:
Three centimeters of ambiguity.
Does that mean it's squishy?

subtitles.original: ちょっ!
subtitles.english: Wait!

subtitles.original: らっぴんぐが制服…だぁぁ不利ってこたない ぷ。
subtitles.english:
Wrapping in a school uniform...
It's not necessarily a disadvantage. Poo.

subtitles.original: がんばっちゃ▼やっちゃっちゃ
subtitles.english: Do your best, let's do it!

subtitles.original: そんときゃーっち＆Release ぎョッ
subtitles.english: Then catch & release. Gyo!

subtitles.original: 汗々(Fuu Fuu)の谷間に
subtitles.english: In the valley of sweat (Fuu Fuu)...

subtitles.original: Darlin' darlin' F R E E Z E!!
subtitles.english: Darlin' darlin' F R E E Z E!!

subtitles.original: なんかダるー なんかデるー
subtitles.english: Something's heavy, something's coming out.

subtitles.original: あいしテるー あれ一個が違ってるんるー
subtitles.english: I love you, but one thing is different-run-run.

subtitles.original: なやみン坊ー 高鉄棒ー
subtitles.english: Worried child, high horizontal bar...

subtitles.original: おいしん簿ー いーかげんにシナサイ
subtitles.english: Gourmet report... cut it out already!

subtitles.original: 飛んでったアイツの火照るカラダって
subtitles.english: That guy who flew off, his flushing body...

subtitles.original: 所謂ふつーのおにゃのコ
subtitles.english: is supposedly an ordinary girl.

subtitles.original: 驚いたあたしだけ?
subtitles.english: Was I the only one surprised?

subtitles.english: Pork bone, extra-firm noodles, another serving! Da da da!
